evidence.description: configureVault now matches REQ-014 flat signature configureVault(deps, input). Result<VaultDirectoryConfigured, VaultConfigError> exact, port set ConfigureVaultDeps with vaultId/statDir/settingsSave/clockNow/emit honored. Carry-forward 1c findings (FIND-001..009) resolutions all applied.

REQ-001..REQ-014 fully realized; spec REQ-014 acceptance line and verification-architecture.md Test Harness Layout updated to match the implemented file split (validate-and-transition.ts, map-stat-dir-result.ts, map-settings-save-error.ts) — FIND-004 resolution.

Pipeline error tests now assert error.path on every path-not-found / permission-denied case (FIND-006 resolution). 7 error variants of statDir × FsError plus 5 settings.save FsError variants are exercised.
Cross-product enumerate {Ok(true), Ok(false), Err(permission), Err(disk-full), Err(lock), Err(not-found), Err(unknown)} → {Ok(void), Err(path-not-found), Err(permission-denied)}.

Step ordering invariants statDir → settingsSave → clockNow → emit verified by PROP-CV-008 ordering harness. No dead validateAndTransition call (FIND-002 resolution). clockNow at-most-once on success path; never on failure paths.
Full bun suite 513/513 passing (320 baseline + 193 configure-vault) after in-place resolution of all 6 Phase-3 findings.

Purity boundary holds: pure helpers (validate-and-transition.ts, map-stat-dir-result.ts, map-settings-save-error.ts) have zero matches for Date.now/Math.random/process.*/new Date/globalThis. Effectful shell pipeline.ts touches deps record only.

FIND-003 resolved: 4 fast-check property harnesses (port-call-budget, event-emission-discipline, no-unconfigured-from-pipeline, ordering) now consume their generators end-to-end; success-path varies userSelectedPath via fc.string(min:1) → vaultPath cast. PROP-CV-001..009 mapped to harness files; PROP-CV-007 Tier 0 type-level via tsc.
All property harnesses pass (50+ fast-check cases per harness, 200 numRuns each).
